node_2: correctness of proposals at the proposal branch
edge: The correctness of proposals at the proposal branch is crucial for the performance of the instance segmentation network.
Adjusting the confidence threshold in the proposal branch has an impact on the influence of proposals on the output instance mask.
Lowering the confidence threshold leads to an increase in true-positive masks but also results in more false-positive masks in the output.
False-positive proposals, such as those that are misclassified or erroneously localized, often lead to noisy mask predictions in the instance segmentation process.
Increasing the threshold may result in the loss of some true-positive masks that were detected at lower thresholds.
